changes.description: Updated capabilities list to include workflows, dual incident categories, role-based triage
changes.original: 6 bullet points: Track, Manage Students, Monitor Fleet, Oversee Drivers, Generate Reports, Communicate
changes.updated: 9 bullet points adding: Manage Workflows, Personal Triage, Help & Support; updated descriptions
changes.rationale: Original list did not reflect actual product features

changes.description: Navigation items updated to match actual slideout menu
changes.original: Dashboard, Incidents, Students, Vehicles, Drivers, New Incident, Reports, Communications
changes.updated: Dashboard, Incidents, Students, Drivers, Vehicles, Communications, Reports, Workflows. New Incident accessed via Incidents page button.
changes.rationale: New Incident is not a nav item; Workflows added; order matches actual nav

changes.description: Default landing page corrected
changes.original: The application will load showing the Dashboard as the default view
changes.updated: The application loads showing the Incidents page as the default view
changes.rationale: App.tsx useState('incidents') sets Incidents as default

changes.description: Complete redesign from informational metrics to role-based triage
changes.original: 4 metric cards; line chart trends; pie chart (5 types); bar chart by school; recent incidents timeline
changes.updated: My Incidents section; Needs Attention queue; Unanswered Driver Communications; pie chart (6 categories); bar chart by driver; bar chart by day of week; action dropdowns per incident; reassign dialog
changes.rationale: Dashboard was completely redesigned in the product

changes.description: Incident type categories updated
changes.original: Student Behavior, Safety Violation, Mechanical, Accident, Other
changes.updated: Behavioral, Safety Violation, Aggression/Violence, Driver Defiance, Property Damage, Prohibited Items
changes.rationale: Categories from IncidentTypes.ts with brand color mapping

changes.description: Chart subject changed
changes.rationale: Product shows driver-based bar chart, not school-based

changes.description: Incident status enum reduced from 4 to 3 values
changes.rationale: Product uses 3 statuses; 'Under Review' and 'Resolved' not implemented

changes.description: Incident types expanded from 5 generic to 35+ specific
changes.original: Student Behavior, Safety Violation, Mechanical, Accident, Other
changes.updated: 35+ types across 10 categories (Behavioral, Safety Violation, Aggression/Violence, Driver Defiance, Property Damage, Prohibited Items, Privacy Violation, Driver Operational, Driver Safety, Vehicle Incident)
changes.rationale: IncidentTypes.ts defines comprehensive type taxonomy

changes.description: Incident detail changed from dialog to full page
changes.original: Click ID opens detailed incident view in a dialog
changes.updated: Click ID navigates to full Incident Detail Page with workflow auto-assignment
changes.rationale: IncidentDetailPage is a dedicated full-page component

changes.description: Expanded from dialog to full page with 6 tabs
changes.original: Dialog with Basic Info, Involved Parties, Details, Witnesses, Timeline, Action Buttons
changes.updated: Full page with tabs: Overview, Workflow, History, Photos, Documents, Communications; workflow step management; approval dialog; inline messaging; incident navigation
changes.rationale: Major feature expansion for workflow management and document/communications integration

changes.description: Redesigned from 5-step wizard to single-page form
changes.original: 5-step wizard: Basic Info > Involved Parties > Details > Additional Info > Review
changes.updated: Single-page form with category selector (Student/Driver), autocomplete lookups, file uploads, interactive map
changes.rationale: Form redesigned for efficiency; no multi-step wizard implemented

changes.description: Types expanded and categorized by incident subject
changes.original: 5 types: Student Behavior, Safety Violation, Mechanical, Accident, Other
changes.updated: 35+ types filtered by incidentCategory (student vs driver) with auto-severity defaults
changes.rationale: IncidentTypes.ts provides comprehensive categorization

changes.description: Grade filter replaced with school filter
changes.rationale: Product implements school-based filtering, not grade-based

changes.description: Rating system changed from numeric to qualitative
changes.original: Safety Rating: Performance rating (star out of 5.0)
changes.updated: Safety Rating: text label (Good/Excellent/Needs Improvement); separate Performance Score (0-100%) and On-Time Percentage
changes.rationale: Driver data model uses qualitative safety rating with separate numeric scores

changes.description: Redesigned from generic comms to incident-centric messaging
changes.original: Communications table with Type/Subject/Priority columns; separate communication management
changes.updated: Two-panel incident-linked messaging; coordinator/driver roles; message status tracking (sent/delivered/read); deep-link from Dashboard
changes.rationale: Communications built as incident-specific messaging hub

changes.description: Simplified from comprehensive analytics to quick reports
changes.original: 5 quick reports; Custom Report Builder (6 steps); Analytics Dashboard; Scheduled Reports
changes.updated: 8 quick report cards with preview dialog and CSV export
changes.rationale: Custom builder, analytics dashboard, and scheduling not yet implemented

changes.description: New screen for workflow template management
changes.rationale: Major feature not documented in original guide

changes.description: New screen for visual workflow editing
changes.rationale: Major feature not documented in original guide

changes.description: New screen with Getting Started, User Guide, and FAQ tabs
changes.rationale: HelpPage.tsx exists but was undocumented

changes.description: Header notification dropdown component documented
changes.rationale: NotificationsDropdown.tsx exists but was undocumented

changes.description: Reduced from 4 to 3 severity levels
changes.rationale: Product uses 3 levels; Critical not a separate severity value

changes.description: Added 13 new system-wide documentation sections
changes.rationale: Template requirements: Global UI Components, Search/Filter behavior, Incident Lifecycle, Workflow Reference, Notifications & Integrations, Audit & Logs, Security & Permissions, Design Tokens, Accessibility, Developer Notes, Glossary expansion

changes.description: Sample data rows removed throughout; replaced with field-level metadata
changes.original: Some sections contained sample data tables
changes.updated: NOTE: Sample rows removed. See field definitions for the kind of data stored.
changes.rationale: Per documentation policy - no sample rows or dataset dumps
